segments.text: Bhura Shree Kundalini Mata Shri Nirmala Devi Ki Jai!
Ah, may God bless you all.
The other day I talked to You about
the importance of dedication in Sahaja Yoga
and devotion that one should have
to the mountain, we can't see much of it.
And that's why We don' t realize
That is so close To us
How far they Have to go
why are they chosen, what is their purpose of life?
What has happened to him when he got realization actually

nothing can be realized through Your understanding.
